features: RCA to 3.5mm Audio Cable: UGREEN RCA to Aux Cable makes it easy to play music from devices of 3.5mm jack on old audio output devices of 2RCA(Red and White) ports, like Hi-Fi amplifier, speaker, turntable, DVD player, AV receiver. The RCA 3.5mm Jack Cable revives the old devices and offers more ways to enjoy music.

Hi-Fi Stereo Sound: UGREEN Phono to 3.5mm Jack Cable delivers lossless & high-fidelity stereo audio. Made of high-quality materials(gold-plated connectors, polished metal shells, robust shielding), the professional RCA Mini Jack Audio Cable provides superior protection against interference.

Universal Compatibility: The Red and White to 3.5mm Jack Cable supports devices of aux or 2RCA/Phono ports, such as iPod, iPad, MacBook, smartphone, laptop, Notebook, MP3 players, CD player, DVD player, AV receiver, Hi-Fi amplifier, Hi-Fi speaker, subwoofer, turntable, soundbar, stereo headphones, projector, mixer, DJ controller, TV, car, home theater.

Superior Durability: UGREEN 3.5mm to RCA Audio Cable lasts longer. Combined 24K gold-plated connectors, metal shells with soft PVC jacket, the Phono Mini Jack Cable is durable enough to resist more wear and tear. The RCA to 3.5mm Stereo Cable adopts beveled step-down design to offer a secure, fully plugged-in connection.

Bi-Directional RCA to 3.5mm Cable: UGREEN 2 RCA Phono to Headphone Jack Cable is bi-directional, which means it delivers music between Red /White and Auxiliary device, like phone to speaker, TV to Hi-Fi amp, laptop to turntable, iPad to car. The Red and White to Aux Cable is ideal for your daily use.
